empty.add_first_invoice: Add your first invoice to start tracking what your customers owe you.
empty.invoices_filtered: We couldn’t find any invoices with the current filters. Try changing or clearing them to see more results.

error.load_invoices: An error occurred while loading your invoices. Please check your connection and try again.
error.refund_invoice: There was an error issuing a refund for this invoice. Please check your connection and try again in a few seconds.
error.reset_invoice: There was an error resetting this invoice. Please check your connection and try again in a few seconds.
error.void_invoice: There was an error voiding this invoice. Please check your connection and try again in a few seconds.
error.write_off_invoice: There was an error writing off this invoice. Please check your connection and try again in a few seconds.

label.reset_invoice_remove_void_status_warning: Resetting this invoice will remove its current status as void and return it to a sent state.
label.reset_invoice_warning: Resetting this invoice will delete all payments, refunds, and write offs associated with it and return it to a sent state.
label.void_invoice_warning: Voiding this invoice will mark it as cancelled, and you will no longer be able to apply payments to it. This action cannot be undone.
label.write_off_invoice_warning: Writing off this invoice will record it as bad debt, and you will no longer be able to apply payments to it. This action cannot be undone.

validation.due_date_must: Due date must be after invoice date.
validation.due_date_required: Due date is a required field.
validation.either_payment_must: Either a payment method or custom payment instructions must be set on an invoice
validation.invoice_date_required: Invoice date is a required field.
validation.invoice_incomplete_required: Invoice has incomplete line items. Please include required field: Description.
validation.invoice_number_required: Invoice number is a required field.
validation.invoice_requires_empty: Invoice requires at least one non-empty line item.
validation.payment_amount_max_outstanding: Payment amount cannot be greater than the outstanding invoice balance.
validation.payment_amount_must: Payment amount must be greater than zero.
validation.payment_date_not_before_invoice: Payment date cannot be before the invoice date ({{invoiceDate}}).
validation.payment_date_not_future: Payment date cannot be in the future.
validation.payment_date_required: Payment date is a required field.
validation.payment_method_required: Payment method is a required field.
validation.refund_date_before_last_payment: Refund date cannot be before the last invoice payment ({{lastPaymentDate}}).
validation.refund_date_future: Refund date cannot be in the future.
validation.refund_date_required: Refund date is a required field.
